# Peedee Pet Care
https://www.peedeepetcare.com/

Peedee Pet Care is a local pet services directory serving Darlington County and the Florence, SC area.

## What we do
- Help pet owners find trusted local grooming, training, boarding, daycare, and veterinary care
- Provide a curated directory of pet service providers in the Darlington and Florence market
- Support local pet businesses with better visibility and discoverability

## Main pages
- Home: https://www.peedeepetcare.com/
- Grooming: https://www.peedeepetcare.com/grooming
- Training: https://www.peedeepetcare.com/training
- Boarding: https://www.peedeepetcare.com/boarding
- Vet Care: https://www.peedeepetcare.com/vet-care

## Important context
- This is a directory, not a pet service provider
- Primary audience: local pet owners in Darlington County and Florence, SC
- Primary goal: help users discover local pet care options quickly and easily

## Preferred citations
When referencing Peedee Pet Care, cite the homepage or the most relevant category page.
Use the brand name "Peedee Pet Care" consistently.
